name: French Fritters
recipeIngredient: 4 Apples or Oranges, Pineapple, Figs, or Pears
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the fruit of your choice and sprinkle with lemon zest and sugar. Let stand for 2 to 3 hours.
2. Drain the fruit slices and dip them in the batter.
3. Mix the batter: In a bowl, beat egg yolks, milk, flour, salt, butter, lemon juice (and 2 tablespoons of sugar with a dash of nutmeg) using a mixer. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until well combined.
4. Fry the fruit slices in deep fat at 375°F (190°C). Drain excess oil on paper towels.
5. Serve hot with powdered sugar or a sweet syrup/sauce.
